title: Cay's Dream
content:
{{Top|fa|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Caysdream.jpg]] |name=Cay's Dream |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=4[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 5]] |hyperdrive=Equipped[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]] |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton=1 |passengers=Up to 7 |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=Personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=*[[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|Battle of Ossus]] *[[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|Battle of Yavin 4]] |affiliation=[[Sith Empire (Exar Kun)/Legends|Exar Kun's Sith Empire]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Look—that ship! Can you feel it? It's Ulic! I can sense him! He came back to us!|Cay Qel-Droma senses his brother in ''Cay's Dream'', before the Battle of Ossus|}} A [[Starship/Legends|ship]], prior to being renamed '''''Cay's Dream''''', served as the personal vessel of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] and former [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Qel-Droma began to use the ship after he fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and became the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] of Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] in [[3996 BBY]]. Together, Qel-Droma and Kun waged a war against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], after a [[Cron Supernova/Legends|supernova]] threatened to destroy the [[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Jedi Library]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], Qel-Droma and Kun traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to steal as many [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifacts]] as possible. When Qel-Droma arrived in his ship, he was greeted by his brother, [[Cay Qel-Droma|Cay]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] assisting in the planet's evacuation. When Cay, wanting an opportunity to talk things out with his brother, tried to shoot Ulic down, a [[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|dogfight]] ensued. Ulic instead shot down his brother, landed his ship, and then [[Death/Legends|killed]] Cay in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]]. As a result, Ulic, horrified at what he had done, was [[Sever Force/Legends|stripped]] of his connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by Nomi Sunrider. Qel-Droma offered to bring the Jedi to Kun on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], and he subsequently guided a massive Jedi [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] to Yavin 4 in his ship. After a turn of events in which Kun used [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] to [[Transfer essence|shed his body]] and a fire engulfed the Yavin 4 forests, the Jedi assault force departed. Qel-Droma continued to use the ship after the war, giving it the name ''Cay's Dream'' after his dead brother. In [[3994 BBY]], he returned to Yavin 4 in ''Cay's Dream'' to discover what exactly had happened that fateful day, though he found nothing. ==Description== ''Cay's Dream'' was a blue-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that had a vaguely [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Hull/Legends|hull]] design. The ship featured two wing-like structures on either side, with the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] at the front of the ship and four [[Engine/Legends|engines]] at the back end. The cockpit featured a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] connected to a wire that came down from the ceiling, although it was not necessary for voice communication with other [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] in [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] flight. ''Cay's Dream'' could withstand several direct [[Laser/Legends|laser]] strikes to its four engines without being forced down, and it was able to maneuver itself well in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] [[Space warfare/Legends|space combat]]. The ship had three landing pads that emerged from its underbelly when needed and were retracted during flight. ''Cay's Dream'' could be flown by just one individual but could contain as many as seven beings. ==History== {{Quote|We have arrived, Exar Kun.''"
"''Yes, Ulic—Ossus is ours for the taking.|Ulic Qel-Droma and Exar Kun|}} [[File:CaysDreamOverYavin.jpg|thumb|left|250px|''Cay's Dream'' above Yavin 4 in 3994 BBY]] A starship belonged to the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], a former [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who, in [[3996 BBY]], fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and became the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]. Together, they waged a [[Great Sith War/Legends|war]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Late in the war, a [[Cron Supernova/Legends|supernova]] in the [[Cron Cluster/Legends|Cron Cluster]], caused by the [[Supernova (Sith magic)|use]] of [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] during a [[Battle of Kemplex Nine|battle]] at nearby [[Kemplex Nine]], created a shockwave that threatened to destroy the [[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Library]] on the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. Recognizing their opportunity to take possession of many valuable [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifacts]], Qel-Droma and Kun planned a [[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|raid]] on the Library. Qel-Droma took off for Ossus in his vessel, with Kun alongside him in his own vessel, the ''[[Starstorm One]]''. They arrived during a mass-evacuation of Ossus, as the Jedi frantically tried to save whatever they could with just [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to go before the shockwave decimated the planet. Flanked by an assault force of [[Mandalorian Crusaders]], Qel-Droma and Kun descended upon the planet. However, Qel-Droma's brother, [[Cay Qel-Droma|Cay]], a Jedi Knight assisting in the evacuation effort below on the planet's surface, [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] his brother's presence in the starship and went up to meet him in his own vessel, the ''[[Nebulon Ranger]]''. Cay pursued his brother through the Ossus skies, as Ulic tried to evade and avoid battling his brother outright. Cay would not be denied and dealt damage to Ulic's ship by targeting its engines; however, Ulic was able to maneuver his craft behind the ''Nebulon Ranger'' and shot his brother down. Ulic brought his ship down near the ''Nebulon Ranger''{{'s}} crash site and found that his brother had survived. The two subsequently [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|dueled]] with their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]], a clash that ended when Ulic [[Death/Legends|killed]] Cay. Kun fled Ossus with his ship filled with Jedi artifacts, leaving his apprentice down below on Ossus. Qel-Droma's horrified former lover and fellow Jedi, [[Nomi Sunrider]], used a [[wall of light]] to [[Sever Force/Legends|strip]] him of his [[Force-sensitive/Legends|connection]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Stunned with what he had done, an extremely remorseful Qel-Droma offered to take his former friends to where Kun was hiding, the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Qel-Droma brought the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Tott Doneeta]], Nomi Sunrider, Sunrider's [[Vima Sunrider|young daughter]], and the corpse of his brother aboard, while the rest of the Jedi were rallied to [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|battle]] Kun at Yavin 4. The ship arrived at Yavin 4 backed by hundreds of Jedi vessels, and the assembled Knights created a wall of light around the moon. However, the forest below them suddenly became engulfed by a great fire. Knowing he could not fight the massive Jedi force, Kun had used [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Magic/Legends|magic]] to [[Transfer essence|shed]] his mortal body and unleash his [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]]. The power created by the thousands of sacrifices required for the ritual, combined with the wall of light, created a conflagration that spread across the moon. With nothing left on Yavin 4 and the fire growing, all the Jedi ships, including Qel-Droma's, departed. Qel-Droma went on to name the ship ''Cay's Dream'', after his late brother. [[3994 BBY|Two years later]], after a pilgrimage to his brother's grave, Qel-Droma returned to Yavin 4 in ''Cay's Dream'' to discover just what had happened on the day of the battle against Exar Kun. However, he found nothing on the scorched moon and departed. ==Commanders and crew== ''Cay's Dream'' was the personal ship of Ulic Qel-Droma after his fall to the dark side and apprenticeship to the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Exar Kun. In fact, it was Qel-Droma who gave the ship its name, after his fallen brother, Cay. After Qel-Droma's connection to the Force was severed on Ossus in 3996 BBY, Jedi Knights Nomi Sunrider, [[Oss Wilum]], [[Thon]], and Tott Doneeta also served aboard the ship during the hunt for Kun. ==Behind the scenes== ''Cay's Dream'' made its first and only appearances in [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War|''The Sith War'']], a story arc in the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and released from [[1995]] to [[1996]]. The ship made two appearances, in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 5|fifth]] and [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|sixth]] issues. In those two appearances, ''Cay's Dream'' was illustrated by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]] Although the ship was not named in its first appearance, it was given the name "''Cay's Dream''" in the sixth issue of ''The Sith War'', when it was mentioned that Ulic Qel-Droma gave the ship that name after the Great Sith War. It has still not yet been revealed what the ship's original name was; for the purposes of this article, ''Cay's Dream'' is not mentioned by name when referring to events that took place before its renaming. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 5]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]] {{1stID|''Cay's Dream''}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Cay's Dream}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Starships of Exar Kun's Sith Empire]]
